reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Best gas station on Route 12... very good service and good gasoline.
It has a very clean bathroom and an area for camping and resting.
I recommend it to all travelers 😜

(Original)
Melhor Posto de Gasolina da Ruta12... muito bom atendimento e Boa Gasolina.
Tem um Banheiro bem Limpo e área para Camping e Descanso.
Indico a todos os Viajantes😜

reviews.comment:
Lugar donde podés encontrar buena gente.Aparte tenés lugar para hacer un alto y almorzar al aire libre, cuenta con mesas y bancos en los espacios verdes.

(Translated by Google)
A place where you can find good people. Plus, there's a place to stop and have lunch outdoors, with tables and benches in the green spaces.

Solo para cargar combustible. El shop es malísimo. No tiene nada decente para comer. Una lastima porque es una parada habitual entre Posadas y corrientes
